title: Digital Service Design Standard – NZ Government
description: New Zealand government standard establishing 12 core principles for designing and delivering user-focused, high-quality digital services. Covers user needs, security, privacy, inclusivity, team composition, and accountability across the full service lifetime.
owner: New Zealand Department of Internal Affairs – Digital Services
